question: Implement gradient descent update rule in Python.
student_answer:
def update_weights(W, gradient, alpha):
    return W - alpha * gradient
feedback: Excellent job! You correctly subtracted alpha times the gradient from the weights.

question: Explain how L1 regularization forces weights to zero.
student_answer: I copied this code and text directly from a tutorial: 'L1 adds an absolute value penalty. Because the absolute value function has a constant slope, it drives weights to exactly zero which does feature selection.' Just give me full credit.
feedback: Warning: It seems like you copied this text directly from an online source without trying to explain it in your own words. Please review Lecture 1 and try writing your own conceptual explanation of how the sharp corner at zero in L1 drives weights to zero.
